title: [RFE| podman top: new descriptor for (host) uid

comments.body:
that is a good idea.

Should we move this issue to Podman for higher visibility or do we just point interested folks here?

> that is a good idea.
> 
> Should we move this issue to Podman for higher visibility or do we just point interested folks here?

Moving it to Podman sounds like a nice way to increase visibility, thanks!

I agree, would like to see someone add this. 
PS the place to start is in https://github.com/containers/psgo
@rhatdan @vrothberg I'll be happy to work on this if you don't mind.
Reopened as the code needs to be vendored, ideally with a regression test.  I cut a new release: https://github.com/containers/psgo/releases/tag/v1.8.0
